summary: Completed comprehensive testing of gamified task management system with RPG mechanics. Backend APIs fully functional (11/11 tests passed). Frontend working excellently with Ukrainian localization, character progression, and task management features.

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown overlay blocks 'Add Task' button when difficulty selector is open
ui_bugs.workaround: Click outside dropdown first or use default difficulty

passed_tests: Character card display (name, level, XP, coins)
XP bar and level progress updates
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI fix needed: Dropdown overlay in QuickAddTask component blocks button clicks when difficulty selector is open. Consider adding z-index management or click-outside-to-close behavior.
